limitations: sequence_counter is per-EventLog-instance; it resets to 0 on process restart — no global monotonic guarantee.
append() remains the primary call site (44 callers); append_with_origin() is additive for callers that need EventOrigin attribution.
EventEnvelope is serialized to JSONL only when a path is set; in-memory-only EventLog instances do not persist envelopes.
sequence is caller-assigned by append_with_origin's internal counter; callers cannot override or query the current value.
No sequence gap detection or replay validation is performed.
